data.title: Cryptocurrency Performance Trails Behind Precious Metals in 2025
data.description: According to PANews, economist and cryptocurrency critic Peter Schiff shared data on the X platform indicating that Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) have underperformed compared to major precious metals this year. Platinum has surged by 74%, silver by 59%, palladium by 44%, and gold by 43%, while Ethereum has risen by 20% and Bitcoin by 16%. Schiff also highlighted that Bitcoin has been in a prolonged 'stealth bear market,' as its price in gold terms is currently 22% lower than its peak in August 2025 and 20% below its high in November 2021.

data.description:

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by Eight Coins
data.description: According to Foresight News, El Salvador has increased its Bitcoin holdings by eight coins over the past seven days. The country's total Bitcoin reserves now stand at 6,332.18 coins, with a total value of approximately $693 million.

data.title: Binance: Hold at least 190 Alpha Points to claim 375 GOATED airdrops
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Alpha will list the GOAT Network (GOATED). Alpha trading will begin at 17:00 (UTC+8) on September 27, 2025. After trading begins, users holding at least 190 Binance Alpha Points will be eligible to claim an airdrop of 375 GOATED tokens. This will be on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the event ends. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: Spot Ether ETFs see five-day outflow streak amid 10% price drop
data.description:
Ether ETFs post $795. 8M outflows over 5 days as ETH price drops 10. 8% to $3,995. SEC staking decision looms; Grayscale readies to stake ETH holdings amid pressure
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/spot-ether-etfs-see-five-day-outflow-streak-amid-10-price-drop/

data.title: The whale that bought $33 million of XPL today opened a short position with 2x leverage, possibly for spot hedging.
data.description: On-chain analyst Ember Monitoring said that the whale that spent 33 million USDC to buy 24.295 million XPL today has now transferred 7 million USDC to the contract account and started shorting XPL with 2x leverage. It currently has a short position of 1.54 million XPL and may hedge its spot position.

data.title: Vanguard Considers Enabling Cryptocurrency ETF Access for Clients
data.description:
Vanguard, the second-largest asset manager, considers allowing clients to invest in select cryptocurrency ETFs due to increased demand and regulatory shifts.
source: https://coincu.com/364943-vanguard-considers-cryptocurrency-etfs

data.title: Analyst Reports Significant XPL Trading Activity
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain analyst @ai_9684xtpa has observed a notable trading activity involving Huang Licheng. Huang has opened a leveraged position of 4.7 million XPL tokens, valued at $7.42 million, with a leverage of 5x. The opening price for this position was $1.56 per token, and it has already generated an unrealized profit of $140,000.

data.title: "Big Brother Maji" once again went long on XPL, now making a profit of $140,000
data.description: On-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa) reported that Huang Licheng, known as "Big Brother Maji," has once again gone long on XPL, opening a long position of 4.7 million XPL with 5x leverage at $1.56, resulting in a $140,000 profit. However, his account still has a total loss of $15 million.

data.title: Supreme Court lets Trump block $4 billion in foreign aid spending
data.description:

data.title: A whale increased its holdings of XPL by $30 million, leaving over $40 million in funds for further increases.
data.description: On-chain analyst Ember Monitoring reports that a whale address that transferred 30 million USDC to Hyperliquid this morning has increased its holdings by 22.37 million XPL at an average price of $1.34. The initial purchase of XPL was at $1.17, and the price has now risen to $1.53, a gain of over 30%. The address has 41.52 million USDC remaining from Kraken, 10 million of which has also been transferred to Hyperliquid and may be used to purchase XPL again.
